title: Croatian Gouda Wrap
description: A flavorful and savory wrap filled with the richness of Croatian ingredients, perfect for a satisfying snack or meal.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Place the sliced ham in the pan and cook until lightly browned.
Add the caramelized onions to the pan and stir to combine.
Add the shredded Gouda cheese to the pan and stir until melted.
Warm the savory wrap in the pan for a few seconds on each side.
Assemble the wrap by spreading the ham and cheese mixture onto the wrap.
Top with chopped parsley and sliced sweet peppers if using.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
